chapter_title.en: Punishment of having one’s name written in the Register of the unjust

text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ یَعْقُوبَ بْنِ یَزِیدَ عَنِ ابْنِ بِنْتِ الْوَلِیدِ بْنِ صَبِیحٍ الْبَاهِلِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ سَوَّدَ اسْمَهُ فِی دِیوَانِ الْجَبَّارِینَ [مِنْ] وُلْدِ فُلَانٍ حَشَرَهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ خِنْزِیراً.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ya’qub b. Yazid from Ibn bint al-Waleed b. Sabeeh al-Bahili from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who gets his name entered in the registers of the son of so and so, Allah will resurrect him as a pig on the Day of Judgment.”
